Class BeanFactoryPayloadSplitterLookup<T,R>

java.lang.Object
com.societegenerale.failover.core.payload.splitter.BeanFactoryPayloadSplitterLookup<T,R>
All Implemented Interfaces:
PayloadSplitterLookup<T,R>, org.springframework.beans.factory.Aware, org.springframework.beans.factory.BeanFactoryAware
public class BeanFactoryPayloadSplitterLookup<T,R> extends Object implements PayloadSplitterLookup<T,R>, org.springframework.beans.factory.BeanFactoryAware
Spring BeanFactory-backed implementation of PayloadSplitterLookup.

Resolves a PayloadSplitter by delegating to BeanFactory.getBean(String, Class), which matches by both qualifier and bean name.

Author:
Anand Manissery

  • Method Details

    • lookup

      public PayloadSplitter<T,R> lookup(String name)
      Returns the PayloadSplitter bean registered under name.
      Specified by:
      lookup in interface PayloadSplitterLookup<T,R>
      Parameters:
      name - qualifier or bean name as declared in @Failover(payloadSplitter = "...")
      Returns:
      matching PayloadSplitter

    • setBeanFactory

      public void setBeanFactory(@NonNull org.springframework.beans.factory.BeanFactory beanFactory) throws org.springframework.beans.BeansException
      Injects the Spring BeanFactory used for payload-splitter lookups.
      Specified by:
      setBeanFactory in interface org.springframework.beans.factory.BeanFactoryAware
      Parameters:
      beanFactory - the bean factory to use
      Throws:
      org.springframework.beans.BeansException - if setting the bean factory fails
